column1: # Curated Mathlib kernel trace probe set.
# Keep this list small enough for quick iteration. It is intended to sample
# different kernel/reducer surfaces before paying for full Mathlib verification.
# Rows should normally be trace-comparable: both instrumented Lean and Ansatz
# should emit at least one target event. List/Fin-adjacent files require the
# Mathlib Plausible package to be present and built in .lake/packages.
# Currently disabled because the instrumented Lean run exits before producing
# target trace events for these declarations in this local Mathlib checkout.
# Re-enable after the Lean-side tracer crash/early-exit is understood.
